name: Sable Voss
excerpt: A former supply administrator living with Dellan Moor.
notes: Sable Voss was a supply administrator in the 14th Lowland regiment. She and Dellan Moor decided to desert together after weeks of careful conversation. They have been living together in a disused waystation on the moorland for eight months. Sable is trusted completely by Dellan, though the nature of their relationship remains uncertain.
